title: My School Schedule
story_html: Every morning I check my schedule. It tells me what class comes next. My classroom is up the stairs. I open the door and walk in. My favorite subject is art. Today we are coloring pictures of animals. I draw an elephant with a long trunk. It lives in the wild. A lion is a predator. It hunts other animals for food. At lunch, I eat yogurt with fruit. It is a healthy snack. Every day is different at school.

different.def: Not the same as something else.

door.def: A moving barrier used to open or close an entrance.

wild.def: Living in nature, not kept by people.

favorite.def: Liked more than all the others.

predator.def: An animal that hunts other animals for food.

schedule.def: A plan that shows what happens and when.

stairs.def: A set of steps that go up or down.

yogurt.def: A thick, creamy food made from milk.

elephant.def: A very large animal with a long trunk and big ears.

questions.qtext: What is the writer's favorite subject?
questions.explain: The story says, "My favorite subject is art."

questions.qtext: What animal does the writer draw in art class?
questions.explain: The story says, "I draw an elephant with a long trunk."

questions.qtext: "A lion is a predator." What does predator mean?
options: An animal that hunts other animals for food
An animal that lives in water
An animal kept as a pet
questions.explain: A predator is an animal that hunts other animals for food, like the lion.

questions.qtext: What does the writer eat for lunch?
questions.explain: The story says, "At lunch, I eat yogurt with fruit."

questions.qtext: "My classroom is up the stairs." What does stairs mean?
options: A set of steps that go up or down
questions.explain: Stairs are a set of steps that go up or down, leading to the classroom.
